enum_values.name: Absolute
enum_values.summary: The dimensions from a common starting point.

enum_values.name: RelativeAndAbsolute
enum_values.summary: The combination of point to point and a common start point.

enum_values.name: USAbsolute
enum_values.summary: The dimensions from a common starting point, which includes a running dimension mark (RD).

enum_values.name: USAbsolute2
enum_values.summary: The dimensions from a common starting point, which includes a running dimension mark (RD), but short dimensions are changed to point to point dimensions.

enum_values.name: AbsoluteWithShortRelatives
enum_values.summary: The dimensions from a common starting point, but short dimensions are changed to point to point dimensions.

enum_values.name: AbsoluteWithAllRelativesAbove
enum_values.summary: The combination of point to point and a common start point, but the point to point dimensions are placed above the absolute.

enum_values.name: Elevation
enum_values.summary: Creates an elevation dimension at a picked point.
